note: 40 per-mode SOL-xhigh slots for packet 065/005 EXTENSION run-2. 8 modes x 5 angles each (ai-system-improvement excluded per operator). Each mode's 5 angles: A1 state-of-the-art, A2 unique-value/moat, A3 mechanisms/reference-impls, A4 failure-modes/guardrails, A5 synthesis. Core dual question every iteration: (1) how to improve THIS mode specifically, (2) what makes it UNIQUELY valuable vs the other deep modes and vs generic alternatives, and how to sharpen that moat. Seeded from 001 (216 repos) + 005 run-1 (74 repos) as do-not-re-list; run-1's 59 recs were runtime-centric, so this run is MODE-centric.

deep-research.identity: Autonomous deep-research loop: iterative investigation, externalized JSONL state, convergence detection, fresh context per pass, findings registry, memory-graph save.
deep-research.generic_alt: a one-shot 'deep research' chat agent (OpenAI/Google/Perplexity deep research, GPT-Researcher)

deep-review.identity: Autonomous iterative code-review loop: externalized state, convergence detection, P0/P1/P2 findings, adversarial verify, fresh context per pass, review-report.md.
deep-review.generic_alt: a single-shot LLM PR reviewer (CodeRabbit, Greptile, Cursor Bugbot) or a static linter

deep-ai-council.identity: AI Council: multi-seat diverse-lens planning/deliberation, multi-round critique, convergence checks, packet-local artifacts, council test gate.
deep-ai-council.generic_alt: a single strong model, or self-consistency sampling of one model

deep-improvement.identity: Evaluator-first bounded agent improvement: 5-dimension scoring, dynamic profiling, packet-local candidates, guarded promotion.
deep-improvement.generic_alt: naive 'ask the model to improve its own prompt/agent' with no frozen evaluator

deep-alignment.identity: Autonomous standard-authority conformance audit by lane: verify-first findings, known-deviation suppression, read-only default.
deep-alignment.generic_alt: a linter, or a one-shot 'check this against the rules' prompt

agent-improvement.identity: deep-improvement variant: benchmark-anchored improvement of AGENT definitions/prompts/loops via behavior benchmarks + discipline stress tests + guarded promotion.
agent-improvement.generic_alt: manual prompt tweaking / vibes-based agent editing

model-benchmark.identity: deep-improvement variant: in-workflow task-anchored model benchmarking (router mode-A vs live mode-B), 5-dim scoring, cost-aware selection.
model-benchmark.generic_alt: public leaderboards (LMArena, HELM) / one-off manual model comparison

skill-benchmark.identity: deep-improvement variant: benchmarking a SKILL (packaged instruction+resource bundle) across executors, gold-set scoring, empty-gold detection.
skill-benchmark.generic_alt: benchmarking the underlying model instead of the skill, or no skill eval at all

slots.directive: Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) autonomous deep-research agent systems (OpenAI Deep Research, Google/Gemini Deep Research, Perplexity, GPT-Researcher, STORM, open-deep-research clones, dria, local-deep-researcher). For each: what does its loop control, source triangulation, query planning, and synthesis do that our externalized-state loop does NOT? Give real repos/URLs + concrete adoptable mechanisms mapped to deep-research.

What makes an EXTERNALIZED-STATE, deterministic-resume, fresh-context-per-pass, non-converging-broadening, spec-kit/memory-graph-integrated research loop uniquely valuable versus a one-shot deep-research chat agent? Find evidence for where stateful/resumable/auditable research wins. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN that moat (provenance-verified sources, replayable runs, novelty-driven divergence) so deep-research is best-in-class at what only it can do.

Find concrete, file/module-level reference implementations for deep-research's hard parts: claim/source verification (anti-hallucination), contradiction tracking across iterations, novelty-driven next-query generation, convergence detection for research (vs code). Real repos + algorithms + API shapes. Give actionable designs for deep-research + runtime/dedup-novelty + runtime/convergence.

How do autonomous research loops FAIL: hallucinated/fabricated sources, premature convergence, redundant-query thrash, context poisoning, citation drift, confirmation bias. Find taxonomies + detection signals + guardrails from real systems. Map to observability gauges + convergence. Recommend how deep-research fails safe and self-detects low-quality iterations.

Synthesis pass for deep-research. Across the prior 4 angles, produce the highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) and a sharp one-paragraph 'why deep-research is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Surface remaining gaps and next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) AI code-review systems (CodeRabbit, Greptile, Cursor Bugbot, Graphite Diamond, Semgrep Assistant, PR-Agent/Qodo, Devin review, SWE-bench-style verifiers). What do their multi-pass/agentic review loops, severity models, and false-positive controls do that our iterative P0/P1/P2 loop does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms mapped to deep-review.

What makes an ITERATIVE, convergence-gated, adversarially-verified (finding-as-hypothesis), fresh-context multi-pass review uniquely valuable versus a single-shot LLM PR review or a static linter? Find evidence that multi-pass + verification beats one-shot. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat (adversarial verification, P0/P1/P2 calibration, dimension-coverage guarantees, false-positive suppression).

Concrete reference impls for deep-review: cheap-deterministic-checks-before-judges cascades, adversarial finding verification (refute-by-N), cross-pass finding dedup, severity calibration, coverage/dimension tracking, regression-gated fix verification. Real repos (promptfoo, semgrep, oss-fuzz, CascadeEvaluator) + code. Actionable designs for deep-review + runtime/gauges-observability.

How do AI review loops FAIL: false-positive floods, whole missed bug classes, reviewer sycophancy, severity inflation, gaming/format-hacking, non-converging churn. Find detection signals + guardrails. Recommend how deep-review stays high-precision and self-detects a bad pass.

Synthesis pass for deep-review. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why deep-review is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) multi-agent debate / deliberation / council / mixture-of-agents systems (LLM-Debate, Society-of-Minds, MoA, ChatEval, constitutional/CAI panels, multi-agent-verify, self-MoA). What do their deliberation protocols, aggregation, and diversity controls do that our multi-seat council does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms mapped to deep-ai-council.

What makes a multi-SEAT diverse-lens deliberating council uniquely valuable versus one strong model or self-consistency sampling — given the effective-independence problem (9 correlated seats can equal ~2 real votes)? Find evidence on when councils actually beat a single model. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: genuine seat diversity, role separation, blinded adjudication, effective-independence gating. This is the operator's most-valued mode — go deep.

Concrete reference impls for council adjudication BEYOND majority vote: bayesian/Dawid-Skene aggregation, debate-with-judge, weak-to-strong, blinded pairwise, protocol-router (evidence->pairwise->debate), seat-selection-as-experimental-design (info-gain-per-cost), judge calibration + bias mitigation (bandwagon/verbosity/position). Real repos + metrics + code. Actionable designs for deep-ai-council.

How do councils/debates DEGENERATE: groupthink, bandwagon cascades, verbosity/position bias, seat collusion, confident-wrong consensus, diversity collapse over rounds. Find taxonomies + detection signals (stance-flip toward majority vs evidence) + guardrails. Recommend how deep-ai-council fails safe and detects false consensus.

Synthesis pass for deep-ai-council. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why deep-ai-council is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) self-improvement / evaluator-first / evolutionary-agent systems (AlphaEvolve, ADAS, Promptbreeder, DSPy/MIPROv2, GEPA, STOP self-taught-optimizer, self-rewarding LMs). What do their candidate generation, evaluation, and promotion gates do that our evaluator-first 5-dim loop does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms mapped to deep-improvement.

What makes an EVALUATOR-FIRST, guarded-promotion, bounded improvement loop uniquely valuable versus naive 'ask the model to improve itself' — given Goodhart/reward-hacking? Find evidence that frozen-evaluator + regression-gated promotion beats open-loop self-edit. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: frozen eval canaries, shadow-then-promote, adversarial evaluators.

Concrete reference impls for deep-improvement: evaluator-first harness design, multi-dimension score calibration + keeping raw pre-reduction scores, candidate-generation strategies (evolutionary/reflective), guarded-promotion gates, shadow evaluation, metamorphic/adversarial eval. Real repos + code. Actionable designs for deep-improvement.

How do self-improvement loops DEGENERATE: reward hacking, evaluator overfitting, mode collapse, capability drift, sycophancy amplification, spurious 'improvements'. Find taxonomies + detection + guardrails (frozen canaries, held-out evals, promotion vetoes). Recommend how deep-improvement fails safe.

Synthesis pass for deep-improvement. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why deep-improvement is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) automated conformance / policy-as-code / spec-conformance / compliance-audit systems (Semgrep, OPA/Rego, Conftest, constitutional classifiers, spec-conformance harnesses, guardrails frameworks). What do their authority-to-rule compilation and verification do that our verify-first lane audit does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms mapped to deep-alignment.

What makes a VERIFY-FIRST, lane-scoped, authority-anchored, read-only conformance auditor uniquely valuable versus a linter or a one-shot 'check against the rules' prompt? Find evidence for authority-grounded + evidence-gated auditing. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: authority grounding, known-deviation-suppression precision, verify-first false-positive control.

Concrete reference impls for deep-alignment: authority/spec -> checkable-rule compilation, verify-first evidence gating, known-deviation registries + suppression, lane decomposition, drift detection when the authority changes. Real repos + code. Actionable designs for deep-alignment + runtime/continuity-threading.

How do conformance auditors FAIL: false positives, stale/misquoted authority, silently missed violations, over-suppression hiding real drift, lane gaps. Find detection + guardrails. Recommend how deep-alignment stays high-precision AND high-recall and detects authority staleness.

Synthesis pass for deep-alignment. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why deep-alignment is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) automatic AGENT/prompt optimization systems (DSPy, GEPA, TextGrad, ADAS, Agent-Symbolic-Learning, EvoPrompt, trace/opto). What do their agent-definition optimization + behavior evaluation do that our benchmark-anchored agent-improvement variant does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms mapped to agent-improvement.

What makes benchmark-anchored, evaluator-first improvement of AGENT definitions (behavior benchmarks + discipline stress tests + guarded promotion) uniquely valuable versus manual prompt tweaking? Find evidence. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: behavior-benchmark coverage, discipline stress-test suites, regression-gated agent promotion.

Concrete reference impls: agent behavior benchmarking, discipline/stress-test design, prompt/agent optimization algorithms (reflective + evolutionary), regression gating for agent definitions, transfer across executors. Real repos + code. Actionable designs for agent-improvement.

How does agent optimization FAIL: benchmark overfit, prompt brittleness/instability, capability regression on un-benchmarked behaviors, spec-gaming. Find detection + guardrails. Recommend how agent-improvement avoids overfitting and preserves discipline.

Synthesis pass for agent-improvement. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why agent-improvement is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) LLM benchmarking/eval harnesses (lm-evaluation-harness, HELM, LiveBench, LMArena/Elo, inspect-ai, contamination-free & dynamic benchmarks, LLM-as-judge frameworks). What do their statistical rigor, contamination resistance, and judge calibration do that our router-A/live-B model-benchmark variant does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms.

What makes an IN-WORKFLOW, own-task-anchored, cost-aware model benchmark (router mode-A vs live mode-B) uniquely valuable versus public leaderboards? Find evidence that task-relevant private evals beat generic leaderboards for model selection. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: own-task relevance, contamination resistance, cost-normalized selection.

Concrete reference impls: benchmark item design, statistical significance / confidence intervals / paired tests, contamination detection, LLM-judge calibration + de-biasing, cost-normalized scoring, elo/bradley-terry ranking. Real repos + code. Actionable designs for model-benchmark (tie to packet-056 benchmark-validity lessons).

Benchmark VALIDITY threats: train-test contamination, judge bias/self-preference, high variance / too-few-items, gameable rubrics, gold-set errors. Find detection + guardrails (echo the packet-056 two-reviewer audit findings). Recommend how model-benchmark stays valid and self-audits.

Synthesis pass for model-benchmark. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why model-benchmark is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.

Survey the NEWEST (2025-2026) capability/skill/tool-use evaluation systems (agent skill evals, tool-use & function-calling benchmarks, tau-bench, SWE-bench/agent harnesses, gorilla/BFCL, task-completion suites). What do their capability-attribution methods do that our cross-executor skill-benchmark variant does NOT? Real repos/URLs + adoptable mechanisms.

What makes benchmarking a SKILL (packaged instruction+resource bundle) across multiple executors uniquely valuable versus benchmarking the underlying model? Find evidence on skill-vs-model attribution. Propose concrete ways to SHARPEN the moat: skill/model attribution, mode-A router vs mode-B live separation, executor-diversity, empty-gold detection.

Concrete reference impls: skill scoring rubrics, gold-set design + validation (detecting empty/overfit gold), executor-matrix benchmarking, controlling model-vs-skill confounds, per-scenario baselines. Real repos + code. Actionable designs for skill-benchmark (tie to packet-056).

Skill-benchmark VALIDITY threats: empty gold sets, overfit gold, executor confounds masking the skill's effect, scenario contamination, ceiling/floor effects. Find detection + guardrails. Recommend how skill-benchmark produces trustworthy skill attribution.

Synthesis pass for skill-benchmark. Highest-leverage MODE-SPECIFIC recommendations (impact x effort) + a sharp 'why skill-benchmark is uniquely valuable and how we make it more so' thesis. Remaining gaps + next_angles.
